title: arthraxon schmidtii
intro: Arthraxon schmidtii, also known as joint pine or joint grass, is a type of grass native to tropical and subtropical regions. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Arthraxon schmidtii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and swelling, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Arthraxon schmidtii is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction for its medicinal uses, and it can also be used as a topical application to relieve joint pain and inflammation.
